channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gamedeveloper.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gamedeveloper.com

item.title: Crimson Desert tops 6M sales within three months
item.content:encoded:
Newsbrief: Crimson Desert, the colossal RPG by Black Desert Online developer Pearl Abyss, has topped six million sales within three months. The game was launched on March 19.

"Crimson Desert has sold through over six million copies worldwide," reads a Facebook post published yesterday. "Your adventures and tales continue to make the journey of Crimson Desert even more special. Once again, thank you to every Greymane who has stepped into Pywel and experienced the world of Crimson Desert in their own way."

The game topped 2 million sales within a day. At the time, the developer said it was listening closely to feedback and working on making improvements quickly, with the game having mixed reviews on Steam. It now currently has a Very Positive rating aggregating almost 60,000 reviews total.

A few days after release, Pearl Abyss apologized for failing to disclose the use of generative AI during production.

Related:Independent game publications revive bundles in defiance of 'cut-throat competitive market'

About the Author

Contributing Editor, News, GameDeveloper.com

Diego Nicolás Argüello is a freelance journalist and critic from Argentina. Video games helped him to learn English, so now he covers them for places like The New York Times, NPR, Rolling Stone, and more. He also runs Into the Spine, a site dedicated to fostering and supporting new writers, and co-hosted Turnabout Breakdown, a podcast about the Ace Attorney series. He’s most likely playing a rhythm game as you read this.



https://www.gamedeveloper.com/business/crimson-desert-tops-6m-sales-within-three-months
